# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-05-29 | **更新时间**: 07:46 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[04:30]` **Aurion Biotech 将在六月即将举行的眼库和眼科会议上强调其势头**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Aurion Biotech to Highlight Momentum Across Upcoming Eye Bank and Ophthalmology Meetings in June* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[22:35]` **佛罗里达癌症专家和研究所的研究发现，经认可和未经认可的中心的 CAR T 细胞治疗的质量和安全结果具有可比性，强调护理地点是患者获取和体验的关键驱动因素**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute Study Finds Comparable Quality and Safety Outcomes in CAR T-Cell Therapy Across Accredited and Non-Accredited Centers, Highlighting Care Location as Key Driver of Patient Access and Experience* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[22:00]` **循环健康研究发现血浆交换可去除人体血液中的微塑料**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Circulate Health Study Finds Plasma Exchange Removes Microplastics from the Human Bloodstream* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:15]` **随着临床进步浪潮的势头增强，抗衰老细胞疗法达到了 GMP 里程碑**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Anti-Aging Cell Therapy Reaches Major GMP Milestone as Wave of Clinical Advancements Gain Momentum* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **🏛️监管 | 中美双申报成功：Porton Advanced端到端细菌载体CDMO解决方案加速NMPA审批Salvectors创新溶瘤细菌疗法**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *China-US Dual Filing Success: Porton Advanced's End-to-End Bacterial Vector CDMO Solution Accelerates NMPA Approval of Salvectors' Innovative Oncolytic Bacteria Therapy* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **Scribe Therapeutics 展示了支持 STX-1150 的最新临床前数据，STX-1150 是一种临床阶段的表观遗传沉默疗法，旨在在单次剂量后实现多年的 LDL-C 降低**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Scribe Therapeutics Presents Late-Breaking Preclinical Data Supporting STX-1150, a Clinical-Stage Epigenetic Silencing Therapy Designed to Achieve Years of LDL-C Lowering After a Single Dose* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
